CREATE TABLE json_test (o JSON) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT o.key1, arrayJoin(o.key2.arrayKey) AS arrayElement FROM json_test;
CREATE TABLE logs_test (timestamp DateTime, message JSON) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY timestamp;
INSERT INTO logs_test VALUES (now(), '{"logLevel": "info", "message": "Access log entry"}');
CREATE TABLE combined_logs AS SELECT DISTINCT o.key1, l.message FROM json_test AS o JOIN logs_test AS l ON o.key2.nestedKey = JSONExtractInt(l.message, 'logLevel');
SELECT l.message, o.key1 FROM combined_logs AS l JOIN json_test AS o ON JSONExtractString(l.message, 'logLevel') = o.key1;
SET output_format_json_named_tuples_as_objects = 1; SELECT * FROM json_test FORMAT JSONEachRow;
SELECT count(*) FROM json_test WHERE JSONExtractString(o, 'key1') IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE nested_json_test (data JSON) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT o.key1, JSONExtractInt(o.key2, 'nestedKey') AS nestedValue FROM json_test AS o WHERE JSONExtractString(o.key1, '') = 'value1';
